name: linTime2Bits
title: linTime2Bits
description: This function converts specified system times to bit times. The conversion is done using the current baud rate on the channel determined by the CAPL program context.
Calling this function with the explicit channel is only possible from a CAPL program defined in the Measurement Setup of CANoe.

parameters.name: time
parameters.description: System time to be converted [in units of 10 µsec].

description: Extract sync break length of LIN frames
